summary: Founder of Kelpforge.

Soren Hartwhistle is the founder of Kelpforge. Soren pushed back on the proposed valuation during diligence.

---
title: Rafael Maplevale
type: person
aliases: [rafael]
summary: Founder of Glintworks Co.
---

Rafael Maplevale is the founder of Glintworks Co. Rafael flagged churn as the top risk in the latest update.

---
title: Kelpforge

summary: Seed-stage company. Founded by Soren Hartwhistle.

Kelpforge is a seed-stage company. Founded by Soren Hartwhistle. The seed conversation started in 2025.

---
title: Mistral Hollow Partners

Mistral Hollow Partners is an early-stage fund that co-invests on seed rounds.

turns.text: Draft a memo for the partner meeting: Soren Hartwhistle and Rafael Maplevale both want Mistral Hollow Partners in the Kelpforge round.
Make the memo lead with traction, then risks, then the ask.
